concepts.name: InviteLink record shape & idb-keyval store ownership
Single expiry predicate (isExpired) with the expiresAt ?? createdAt+DAY_MS fallback
migrateInviteLinks() fills only missing fields, safe under repeat/concurrent invocation
Incoming join-request gate drops expired or muted links
usageCount incremented only after an approved inviteByNpub, never gates approval itself
Manage-overlay row rendering contract (created/expiry time, usage count, trashcan confirm, expired styling, empty state)
inviteExpiries unread-bell slice, derived on init from persisted expired/expiryNotified/expiryAcknowledged flags, never an in-memory-only counter
Expiry sweep notifies each link at most once (module-level in-flight latch; IDB stamp precedes in-memory bump)
manageLinks=1 query-param contract on /groups: opens only after the target group's detail view has rendered, then strips itself
Every new Copy key introduced by this epic has both a non-empty en and de value
